data.content: Implemented a shared updated-descending retakes comparator that treats invalid timestamps as oldest and breaks full ties by repo scope. Retakes view now uses the shared comparator, and regression coverage was added in beat-sort tests. Validation: bun run lint (pre-existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: fc07-retakes-updated-order. Commit: 1624a772c1a8.
